results.title: DJ Pumma, Influential New York-Based Korean DJ, Dies of Cancer at 46
results.description: New York-based South Korean artist DJ Pumma has died at the age of 46 following a courageous battle with cancer, according to an announcement on her social media channels. Known for her open-format style, she built a distinct career in the city's music scene with notable performances on Sway in the Morning and collaborations with global brands.

results.title: Pati Patni aur Woh Do box office collection Day 3: Ayushmann Khurrana's romedy shows good growth on Sunday, yet trails Kartik Aaryan's version
results.description: Pati Patni aur Woh Do has a decent weekend, but when it is compared to 2019's Pati Patni aur Woh, there's a stark difference between the two.
